title: Create: Encapsulated
description: Bridging compatability between Cobblemon and Create
body:
## Welcome to Create: Encapsulated!
![Workshop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/046b57f0a899cae88bfdea5313bff8029a1c26b9.png)
Create: Encapsulated overhauls Cobblemon's crafting recipes to be better integrated within the Create mod's progression system. 

This mod features Poke Ball crafting via Lids and Sequential Assembly, as well as a new item system: Paint. Paints are based on the 16 available dyes in Minecraft, but now interchangeable between liquid and portable bottled form. Every single Medicine Item (Potions, Status Heals, etc) now have their own liquid form and associated mixing recipes, and Moomoo Milk can be used alongside Basins to deposit Milk. 

There's also a lot of new crafting recipes for Create and Cobblemon's items! All of them are listed on either the mod's wiki, or you can view them directly through the Gallery Tab.

![medicines, milk, and paint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1df66fc331e47714a79c5a09b4eb94b22ded414d.png)

**[Check out the mod's Wiki Page](https://github.com/Twispan/Create-Encapsulated/wiki) for more information regarding Recipes and Mod Interactions, or if you have any questions regarding the mod!**

If you'd like to use this mod's crafting recipes for Poke Balls but dont want both versions (Cobblemon and Create: Encapsulated's) to co-exist; I've made an optional Data Pack to do exactly that, you can find it here -> https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokeball-recipe-remover
